data.imap_account: Pre-fill Allowed Senders from IMAP Account

data_description.direct_printer_url: Select a printer discovered on your network, or type its IPP URL (e.g. http://192.168.1.x/ipp/print). No CUPS required — works with any AirPrint printer.
data_description.cups_url: URL of your CUPS server (e.g. http://192.168.1.x:631). Shown because CUPS was detected on this host.
data_description.printer_name: CUPS printer queue name as registered in CUPS.
data_description.imap_account: Select an IMAP account to automatically add its address to Allowed Senders. You can change this later in Options.
data_description.rescan: Re-scan the network for printers. Make sure the printer is turned ON before scanning. After turning on the printer, wait ~30 s for it to advertise via mDNS, then check this box and submit.

manual_printer.title: Printer Name
manual_printer.description:
Enter the CUPS queue name for the printer at **{cups_url}**.

The queue name is shown in the CUPS web UI under Printers (e.g. `Canon_MG3600_series`).

error.cannot_connect_cups: Cannot reach the CUPS server or IPP printer. Check the URL and that the device is online.
error.cups_or_direct_required: Please provide either a Direct IPP URL or a CUPS Base URL + Printer Queue Name.
error.unknown: Unexpected error — see the Home Assistant logs for details.

error.invalid_time_format: Enter a valid time in HH:MM format (e.g. 07:00 or 22:30).

data.auto_delete: Delete PDF from queue after printing

data_description.allowed_senders: Only emails from these addresses trigger a print job. Leave empty to accept all senders.
data_description.folder_filter: Only process emails arriving in these IMAP folders. Leave empty to accept all folders. Use the exact folder name shown in parentheses above (e.g. INBOX, INBOX/Print).
data_description.imap_account: Select an account to append its email address to Allowed Senders automatically.
data_description.booklet_patterns: If the PDF filename contains any of these substrings it is printed as a booklet (two-sided short-edge, pages reordered).
data_description.queue_folder: Folder where PDFs are saved when using the print_file service. Must be writable by Home Assistant.
data_description.email_action_after_print: What to do with the email in your mailbox after the PDF is printed.
data_description.email_archive_folder: IMAP folder to move emails to when 'Move to archive folder' is selected (e.g. INBOX/Printed). Created automatically by most servers.
data_description.notify_on_failure: Send a Home Assistant notification when a print job fails.
data_description.notify_on_success: Send a Home Assistant notification when a print job completes successfully.
data_description.schedule_enabled: Jobs arriving outside the time window are held in a queue and printed automatically when the window opens.
data_description.schedule_start: Start of the allowed print window (HH:MM, 24-hour). Example: 07:00
data_description.schedule_end: End of the allowed print window (HH:MM, 24-hour). Wrap midnight is supported — e.g. 22:00 start and 07:00 end means print between 10 pm and 7 am.
